rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DINO TACCINI TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Application For An Order To Show Cause Re Contempt And Attorneys Fees; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declarations In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Petitioners' Application for Order to Show Cause re Contempt and for Attorney fees is denied. There is no Proof of Service of the Order to Enforce Settlement Agreement (signed 8/5/13) filed 8/6/13. There is a Proof of Service of the Supplemental Order Granting Attorney Fees (signed 8/23/13) filed 8/27/13, but the order does not set a deadline for payment of the attorney fees. Counsel to prepare an order. Any party who disagrees with the tentative ruling and requests argument must notify the court (415-551-3702) and all parties or counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on 10/23/13. entered by SKH

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ALICE TACCINI TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Application And Application For An Order To Show Cause Re Contempt And Attorneys Fees Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Petitioners' Application for Order to Show Cause re Contempt and for Attorney Fees is denied. There is no order dated August 5, 2013 in the Alice Taccini Trust and no Supplemental Order dated August 12, 2013 in the Alice Taccini Trust. There is an order (signed 8/19/13) filed 8/20/13. There is no Proof of Service of the 8/20/13 order. Counsel to prepare an order. Any party who disagrees with the tentative ruling and requests argument must notify the court (415-551-3702) and all parties or counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on 10/23/13. entered by SKH
